import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useAuthStore } from '../store/authStore'; import { User, Mail, Phone, MapPin, Building, Briefcase, Save, Loader } from 'lucide-react'; const Profile = () => { const { user, updateProfile, isLoading } = useAuthStore(); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ firstName: user?.firstName || '', lastName: user?.lastName || '', phone: user?.phone || '', bio: user?.bio || '', companyName: user?.companyName || '', address: user?.address || '', city: user?.city || '', province: user?.province || '', }); const [success, setSuccess] = useState(false); const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const result = await updateProfile(formData); if (result.success) { setSuccess(true); setTimeout(() => setSuccess(false), 3000); } }; return (

Profile Settings
